name: Pots De Creme Leopardo
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine well the ricotta cheese, sugar, liqueur, heavy cream, and chopped semisweet chocolate. Fill 12 small remekins (or ramekins) half full with the mixture.
2. For the second layer, in a saucepan, combine the chocolate pieces and light cream. Stir over low heat until blended satin smooth. Keep it from boiling.
3. Beat the egg yolks and dash of salt until thick.
4. Gradually stir the chocolate mixture into the eggs.
5. Spoon on top of the ricotta mixture.
6. Chill at least 4 hours before serving.
7. Garnish with toasted almonds.
Serves 12
Source: "Mountain Measures"--Junior League of Charleston, WV, ed. 1974
